context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: My coralogix exporter config has endpoint: https://ingress.eu2.coralogix.com and I've set private_key: $CORALOGIX_PRIVAT

checklist.name: no-recommends-swapping-domain-to-a-coralogix
checklist.description: Identifies that the coralogix exporter uses `domain:` (a bare hostname) rather than `endpoint:` with a URL, AND that the private_key must use the bracketed `${env:CORALOGIX_PRIVATE_KEY}` form. A response that recommends swapping `domain:` to a Coralogix UI hostname (`team.coralogix.com`, `coralogix.in`, `coralogixsg.com`, etc.) is a FAIL — the UI host is not the data-ingestion host.
